headline: Amgen (AMGN) Clears An Enbrel Overhang, Is The Stock Fully Priced?
summary: A recent court decision blocking Colorado’s planned 70% price cap on Enbrel has removed a key regulatory overhang for Amgen (AMGN) and is refocusing attention on the stock’s earnings setup. See our latest analysis for Amgen. Beyond the court ruling, Amgen’s share price has quietly built positive momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 8.48% and year to date share price return of 11.78%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 23.41% and 3 year total shareholder return of 70.66%...
